tags.name: dolphin-store
tags.description: Declarative UI Store Initialization Component (Seeds state via attributes or JSON text content)

globalAttributes.name: data-import
globalAttributes.description: Imports an HTML fragment recursively from the specified relative path or URL.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-get
globalAttributes.description: Performs a GET request to the specified API URL and renders it.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-template
globalAttributes.description: Specifies the CSS selector of the template to use (e.g., #product).

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-bind
globalAttributes.description: Binds the HTML content or properties to a specific state or API response.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-write
globalAttributes.description: Binds input changes to write to the specified store state (e.g., store.property).

globalAttributes.name: data-store-read
globalAttributes.description: Binds element to read/display state from the specified store state (e.g., store.property).

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-validate
globalAttributes.description: Specifies validation rules for the input (e.g., required, email).

globalAttributes.name: data-api-submit
globalAttributes.description: Submits form data to the specified API URL (e.g., POST /api/submit).

globalAttributes.name: data-api-result
globalAttributes.description: Saves the API submission result to the specified state path.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-redirect
globalAttributes.description: URL to redirect the user to after a successful API submission.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-reload
globalAttributes.description: Reloads the page after a successful API submission.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-type
globalAttributes.description: Specifies the rendering type, such as 'context'.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-payload
globalAttributes.description: Payload JSON string to pass with events (e.g., '{{id}}').

globalAttributes.name: data-api-payload
globalAttributes.description: Payload JSON string to send with API events.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-debounce
globalAttributes.description: Time in milliseconds to debounce inputs before triggering an action.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-click
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on click.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-change
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on change.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-submit
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on form submit.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-input
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on input.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-keydown
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on keydown.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-keyup
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on keyup.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-dblclick
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on double click.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-focus
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on focus.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-blur
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on blur.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-mouseenter
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on mouse enter.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-mouseleave
globalAttributes.description: Publishes a custom Dolphin event on mouse leave.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-click
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on click (e.g., POST /api/like).

globalAttributes.name: data-api-change
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on change.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-input
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on input.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-keydown
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on keydown.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-keyup
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on keyup.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-dblclick
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on double click.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-focus
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on focus.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-blur
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on blur.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-mouseenter
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on mouse enter.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-mouseleave
globalAttributes.description: Performs an API request on mouse leave.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-click
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on click (e.g., app.count++).

globalAttributes.name: data-store-change
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on change.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-submit
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on submit.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-input
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on input.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-keydown
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on keydown.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-keyup
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on keyup.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-dblclick
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on double click.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-focus
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on focus.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-blur
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on blur.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-mouseenter
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on mouse enter.

globalAttributes.name: data-store-mouseleave
globalAttributes.description: Runs a Dolphin store action expression on mouse leave.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-text
globalAttributes.description: Binds text content to a property in the closest rendering context.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-html
globalAttributes.description: Binds HTML content to a property in the closest rendering context.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-attr
globalAttributes.description: Binds attributes dynamically (e.g., src:imageUrl, href:linkUrl).

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-class
globalAttributes.description: Binds CSS classes conditionally (e.g., active:isActive).

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-if
globalAttributes.description: Shows the element only if the specified context property is truthy.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-hide
globalAttributes.description: Hides the element if the specified context property is truthy.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-filter
globalAttributes.description: Filters the rendered data array (e.g., status==completed).

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-search
globalAttributes.description: Searches the rendered data array (e.g., title==searchQuery).

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-sort
globalAttributes.description: Sorts the rendered data array (e.g., price.asc or popular).

globalAttributes.name: data-api-toast
globalAttributes.description: Inline success message to show as toast after a successful API request.

globalAttributes.name: data-api-error-toast
globalAttributes.description: Inline error message to show as toast after a failed API request.

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-api-success
globalAttributes.description: ID of a hidden element whose text content is shown as a success toast after a successful API request. Example: data-rt-api-success="my-success-msg"

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-api-error
globalAttributes.description: ID of a hidden element whose text content is shown as an error toast after a failed API request. Example: data-rt-api-error="my-error-msg"

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-api-success-show
globalAttributes.description: ID of an inline alert element to reveal (remove hidden) on API success. Pair with data-rt-alert-duration for auto-hide. Example: data-rt-api-success-show="success-alert"

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-api-error-show
globalAttributes.description: ID of an inline alert element to reveal (remove hidden) on API error. Pair with data-rt-alert-duration for auto-hide. Example: data-rt-api-error-show="error-alert"

globalAttributes.name: data-rt-alert-duration
globalAttributes.description: Duration in milliseconds before the inline alert auto-hides. Use with data-rt-api-success-show or data-rt-api-error-show. Example: data-rt-alert-duration="3000"
